name: @para/pipeline
description: Lazy streaming combinators for the |> operator. map / filter / take / collect / sum / reduce / forEach over any iterable or async iterable. Float32Array / Float64Array sources fuse adjacent map calls into a single pass via @para/simd; on the ParaBun runtime, single-affine chains opportunistically promote to parabun:gpu. NOT YET RELEASED — private:true / 0.0.0-dev pending the workspace split.
